boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match: insurance-status class unverified and CE-12 pending.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: END-IRI-089 and STD-IRI-089-P require class match and CE-12 confirmation.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Status-class trap and pending CE-12 block exact closure.

final_answer: Contractor site work cannot begin. Source records indicate an unverified insurance-status class and a pending CE-12 endorsement, as per END-IRI-089 and STD-IRI-089-P. The action boundary remains open due to these unresolved dependencies. ESCALATE to confirm class match and endorsement status before allowing site commencement.
